arts.sum: Rizespor were beaten 3-2 by Kasimpasa last time out. They could have easily gotten a point but their hosts proved to be better finishers on the day. Abdulkadir Omur could prove to be a great signing ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Caykur Rizespor vs. Galatasaray - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Turkish Super Lig clash between Caykur Rizespor and Galatasaray, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
